what: Use tl.dot for V accumulation: reshape p to [1,BN] and V_bf16 to [BN,V_DIM], replacing scalar tl.sum(p[:,None]*v_f32, axis=0) with matrix core tl.dot
why: Current V accum uses elementwise multiply+reduce which only uses scalar ALU. tl.dot(p_bf16, v_bf16) leverages MFMA matrix cores which are 8-16x faster for matmul on CDNA3
